question: Are there any publishers whose games consistently perform well in a particular region compared to others?

analysis.design_rationale: A heatmap enables comparison of publisher-region sales performance in a succinct matrix layout. Publishers as rows and regions as columns allow quick identification of those whose games sell disproportionately well in certain markets. Given the large publisher count, restricting to the top publishers by global sales targets consistent success, and region columns highlight comparative performance.
analysis.target_insight: Spot publishers whose games have notably high sales concentration in specific regions versus others.

chart_encodings.other_aesthetics: Sort publishers by total Global_Sales descending; label axis ticks; discrete colormap for clarity

transformations: For each publisher, calculate the mean sales for each region: 'NA_Sales', 'EU_Sales', 'JP_Sales', 'Other_Sales'
Filter publishers to those with at least 10 games published for consistency
Select the top 15 publishers by cumulative 'Global_Sales' for readability
data_preparation_steps: Group by df['Publisher'], compute mean for 'NA_Sales', 'EU_Sales', 'JP_Sales', 'Other_Sales', and sum for 'Global_Sales'
Filter groups where publisher released at least 10 games
Form a DataFrame with publisher rows and region columns (mean values)
suggestion.matplotlib_code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib as mpl
df = pd.read_csv('csv_c2_sec\122.csv')
df_pubs = df[~df['Publisher'].isnull()]
df_pubcounts = df_pubs.groupby('Publisher').size()
df_majorpubs = df_pubcounts[df_pubcounts>=10].index.tolist()
df_pubs_group = df_pubs[df_pubs['Publisher'].isin(df_majorpubs)].groupby('Publisher').agg({'NA_Sales':'mean','EU_Sales':'mean','JP_Sales':'mean','Other_Sales':'mean','Global_Sales':'sum'})
df_pubs_group = df_pubs_group.sort_values('Global_Sales',ascending=False).head(15)
region_cols = ['NA_Sales','EU_Sales','JP_Sales','Other_Sales']
data_mat = df_pubs_group[region_cols].values
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10,8))
cmap = mpl.colormaps['viridis'].resampled(7)
im = ax.imshow(data_mat, cmap=cmap)
ax.set_xticks(np.arange(len(region_cols)))
ax.set_xticklabels(region_cols)
ax.set_yticks(np.arange(len(df_pubs_group)))
ax.set_yticklabels(df_pubs_group.index)
for i in range(data_mat.shape[0]):
    for j in range(data_mat.shape[1]):
        val = data_mat[i,j]
        ax.text(j,i, f'{val:.2f}', ha='center', va='center', color='white' if val > data_mat.max()/2 else 'black', fontsize=10)
plt.title('Mean Regional Sales per Publisher\n(Top 15 by Global Sales)', fontsize=16)
cbar = plt.colorbar(im, ax=ax, label='Mean Sales (millions)')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
